# Step 103 — Record generated-file tracking decision

**Phase:** `06-architecture-governance`

## Purpose

Record the decision to track files generated by `moro`.

## Commands

Run from the repository root unless stated otherwise.

```bash
cat > docs/architecture/decisions/adr-0027-track-generated-files.md <<'EOF'
# ADR-0027: Track Generated Files

## Status

Accepted

## Date

2026-06-26

## Context

The `moro` CLI will generate and evolve files over time.

## Decision

Track generated files in `.moro` metadata with ownership, hashes, generator versions, and timestamps.

## Consequences

Future upgrades can detect drift and avoid overwriting user changes.
EOF

python - <<'PY'
from pathlib import Path
p=Path('docs/architecture/decisions/index.md')
text=p.read_text()
row='| ADR-0027 | Track Generated Files | Accepted |'
if row not in text: p.write_text(text.rstrip()+'\n'+row+'\n')
PY
```

## Validate

```bash
grep "ADR-0027" docs/architecture/decisions/index.md
```

## Commit

```bash
git add .
git commit -m "docs(adr): define generated-file tracking"
git push
```
